positive: A minimalist and stylized depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features glowing, bioluminescent flora and elegant, winding roots forming intricate patterns against a deep indigo and nebula-toned sky. The main subject is a central, stylized silhouette of a majestic, mythical owl perched on a crystalline branch. The composition uses strong negative space and highly contrasting color accents (neon teal, glowing lavender, and deep violet). The style should be inspired by sophisticated graphic novel artwork and modern tattoo flash, emphasizing clean lines, symmetrical elements, and flat, high-contrast color blocking. Ideal for screen printing on apparel, suitable for a vertical or square format, rendered with sharp vector aesthetics, maximal detail, crisp edges, ethereal glow.
